title: Cat Disc Reimagined! Machitan-Themed Music Disc Playing Mamboo!!
description: Replace the Cat disc with a texture inspired by Machitan from Uma Musume and change the sound to Mamboo!! Made by Puchi_64.
body: Replace the Cat disc with a texture inspired by Machitan from Uma Musume and change the sound to Mamboo!! Made by Puchi_64.!  [Machitan - Music Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd3d7f2c0a98d969570cb6c770456ccf1a11b7d6_0.webp)
